name: The Rose (Ace of Hearts)
effect: A creature of the DM's choice falls madly in love with you, and will stop at nothing to be alone by your side.

name: The Drake (Ace of Diamonds)
effect: A Dragon of the DM's choice appears in the nearest open space, and immediately attacks.

name: The Magi (Ace of Clubs)
effect: A scroll for a random spell appears in your hand. Roll 1d10 -1 to determine the spell's level.

name: The Coin (Ace of Spades)
effect: You gain 1d10 x 1000 gold pieces. These coins are contained within a chest, which appears within 20 ft of you.

name: The Mountain (King of Diamonds)
effect: Your body is petrified, although you can still speak, and move somewhat freely. Your movement speed is halved (minimum 15 feet), your weight is doubled, your Dexterity score is decreased to 1, you have disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as Dexterity checks and saving throws, you become vulnerable to Thunder damage, resistant to non-magical damage, and immune to poison and disease. This effect lasts until removed by the Greater Restoration spell or similar magic.

name: The Mask (King of Clubs)
effect: A random creature close to you loses all memory of you.

name: The Bear (King of Spades)
effect: Assign each of your ability scores a number 1-6 and roll 1d6. Increase the corresponding stat by 2 to a maximum of 30.

name: The Mirror (King of Hearts)
effect: An exact clone of you appears within 20 feet of you. The clone has your exact stats, appearance, equipment, and abilities (regardless of requirements for those abilities), but exact opposite alignment. If the clone can cast spells, the DM determines what spells it has. This clone immediately attacks the creature it is a clone of. In addition, it believes that it is the original, and you are the clone. You must then fight them in single combat. Anyone who tries to help you will receive a clone to fight as well. The clone dies after failing three death saving throws, and it, along with anything it possessed, is irrevocably destroyed. This happens to you if your clone kills you. If you are True Neutral or unaligned, this card has no effect, returns to the deck, and you must draw again.

name: The Princess (Queen of Hearts)
effect: You become betrothed to the princess of the nearest kingdom (wherever they are). Messengers are sent to deliver summons to the wedding.

name: The Crown (Queen of Diamonds)
effect: A non-magical, jeweled trinket worth at least 1000gp appears somewhere on your body. For example, a necklace would appear around your neck, and a ring would appear on your finger.

name: The Clover (Queen of Clubs)
effect: You automatically succeed on the next ability check or saving throw you make within 24 hours of drawing this card.

name: The Raven (Queen of Spades)
effect: Your closest friend becomes hellbent on killing you.

name: The Vial (Jack of Hearts)
effect: At dawn of every day, 1d4 Potions of Greater Healing appear at your feet. However, any unused potions from the previous day cease to exist.

name: The Coward (Jack of Diamonds)
effect: Every time you roll initiative, you must also roll a Wisdom Saving throw (DC 15) to avoid getting Frightened. This effect lasts until dispelled by Greater Restoration or similar magic.

name: The Well (Jack of Clubs)
effect: You gain the ability to cast the Wish spell once. If you draw this card while under its effects, you do not gain multiple wishes. You must use this wish within one year of drawing this card. Additionally, you must roll 1d20 when you make your wish. On a roll of 1, the wish is not granted and the casting is wasted. If a creature rolls a 1 when using this effect, that creature cannot gain the benefit of this card again in its existence. If a creature that cannot benefit from this card draws this card, it returns to the deck, and that creature must draw again.

name: The Snake (Jack of Spades)
effect: Each of your ability scores is permanently decreased by 1 (minimum 1).

name: The Bard (Two of Clubs)
effect: An instrument of the DM's choice appears in your hands. You gain proficiency with this instrument.

name: The Tree (Two of Spades)
effect: Your height increases by 1d4 feet.

name: The Fang (Two of Diamonds)
effect: 3d4 Wolves, 2d4 Dire Wolves, and 1d4 Winter Wolves appear within 30 feet of you, each in its own space, and immediately attack.

name: The Heart (Two of Hearts)
effect: Your Hit Point Maximum increases by 1d20 + your Constitution modifier + your level.
